info.name: MeepleAI API
info.description:
Generated collection covering MeepleAI API endpoints.
Update tools/postman/generate_collection.py to keep definitions in sync.

item.name: Health
item.description: Infrastructure readiness and liveness endpoints.

request.description: Returns API name and ok=true for basic availability.
Aggregated health check across subsystems.
Readiness probe used by orchestrators to gate traffic.
Liveness probe ensuring process is responsive.
